---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Describe the limitation or use case.

## Proposed solution

What should the feature look like? Be specific about the interface or behavior.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you considered?

## Scope check

Does this align with the project's narrow thesis (representation sufficiency
for research-loop decisions)? If not, explain why it still belongs here.

- [ ] Stays within the representation-sufficiency scope
- [ ] Extends scope — please explain why it's worthwhile
